results.rendered_html:
akalya a. [kalāsu sādhuḥ kalyaḥ nirāmayaḥ na. ta.]
1 Unwell, ill, indisposed.
2 [kalyate iti kal-yat kalyaṃ mithyābhūtaṃ; na. ta.] True; (taṃ) anīnayadakalyasaṃdho baṃdhanāgāraṃ  Dk. 31.
